description: QualityGrade entity template — Composite quality assessment combining automated metrics and AI semantic evaluation
_comment_grade_id: Unique grade identifier (grade-{timestamp}-iter{N}). Auto-generated on grade computation.
_comment_session_id: Parent DevLoopSession reference. Links this grade to session state.
_comment_iteration: Iteration number this grade belongs to (1-based). MUST match session iteration_count.

raw_metrics._comment: Unprocessed quality measurements collected from test runs, linters, type checkers, security scanners, and build output
raw_metrics._comment_test_pass_rate: Ratio of passing tests to total tests. Range: [0, 1]. Most heavily weighted metric (FR-014, FR-023).
raw_metrics._comment_coverage_pct: Test coverage percentage from coverage tool. Range: [0, 100]. Constitutional Principle II requires >= 80%.
raw_metrics._comment_lint_error_count: Number of lint errors from ESLint, Pylint, or equivalent. Zero = 1.0 normalized score.
raw_metrics._comment_type_error_count: Number of type errors from TypeScript, mypy, or equivalent. Zero = 1.0 normalized score.

security_vulnerabilities._comment: Vulnerability counts by severity from security scanner (npm audit, Snyk, Semgrep, etc.). Critical/high = blockers.

normalized_scores._comment: All metrics normalized to [0, 1] scale for composite calculation (FR-012)

weights_used._comment: Weights applied to each metric (FR-015). Copied from DevLoopSession.config.quality_weights. Sum MUST = 1.0

_comment_llm_judge_score: AI-based semantic evaluation (FR-017). Assesses readability, architectural soundness, specification compliance. Range: [0, 1]. Optional.
llm_judge_feedback: Architecture is sound, code is readable, edge cases covered. Consider adding more inline documentation for complex auth flows.
_comment_llm_judge_feedback: Qualitative commentary from AI judge. Provides context for llm_judge_score. Optional.
_comment_llm_judge_model: Model used for semantic evaluation. Optional.
_comment_passed_threshold: Whether this grade meets the quality threshold (FR-016). Determines success termination condition.
_formula_improvement: If iteration > 1: composite_grade - previous_grade.composite_grade. Else: null
_comment_improvement: Quality delta from previous iteration. Used for convergence detection (FR-023).
_comment_timestamp: Grade computation timestamp (ISO8601). Marks when quality assessment completed.

metrics_collection_details._comment: Tools used to collect raw metrics. Optional but useful for debugging.

_validation_rules: All normalized_scores[*] MUST be in range [0, 1]
All weights_used[*] MUST be in range [0, 1]
llm_judge_score MUST be in range [0, 1] if present
iteration MUST be >= 1 and <= parent session's max_iterations
